interfaces.name: getHomepageContent
interfaces.description: Get homepage content including main categories, quick search defaults, shortcuts, and featured shows.

interfaces.name: getSearchFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter and sort options for the events search & results page for a given category.

interfaces.name: searchShowsAndPerformers
interfaces.description: Search for shows and/or performers by category, location, date, filters, and sort order.

parameters.name: location_query
parameters.description: Free-text location such as city and state, e.g., 'Chicago, IL'

parameters.name: radius_miles
parameters.description: Search radius in miles around postal_code or location_query

requires_no_live_animals.description: If true, exclude shows that include live animals

performer.description: Present when result_type is 'performer' or when including performer info for a show

starting_price.description: Starting total price for relevant packages

distance_miles.description: Approximate distance from search location, if applicable

interfaces.name: getShowDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific show, including performer, packages, and related offers.

interfaces.name: getPerformerDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific performer, including their shows and key attributes.

interfaces.name: getPackageAvailability
interfaces.description: Get available start times for a show package on a specific date.

items.description: Start times as 'HH:MM' 24-hour or localized strings like '2:00 PM'

interfaces.name: startPackageBooking
interfaces.description: Create or update an in-progress booking for a selected show package, date, time, and guest count.

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Selected start time, e.g., '14:00' or '2:00 PM'

interfaces.name: getBookingSummary
interfaces.description: Get a summary of an in-progress or confirmed booking, including pricing and suggested packages.

interfaces.name: applyPromoCodeToBooking
interfaces.description: Apply a promo code (e.g., WEEKDAY20) to a booking and return updated pricing and suggestions.

interfaces.name: switchBookingPackage
interfaces.description: Switch the selected package for a booking to another package option and recalculate pricing.

interfaces.name: updateBookingContactAndEventDetails
interfaces.description: Update booking with contact information, party address, and optional notes before payment.

interfaces.name: finalizeBookingAndCreatePaymentSession
interfaces.description: Finalize booking details and create a payment session or token to hand off to payment processing.

interfaces.name: getPackageBuilderInitialData
interfaces.description: Get initial data for the Build Your Own Show page, including event types, age groups, base shows, and add-ons.

interfaces.name: createOrUpdateCustomPackage
interfaces.description: Create or update a draft custom package in the Build Your Own Show flow and calculate pricing.

interfaces.name: getCustomPackageReview
interfaces.description: Get a detailed summary of a custom package for the review page.

interfaces.name: setCustomPackageNameAndRequest
interfaces.description: Set a custom package name and submit the custom package request.

parameters.name: custom_name
parameters.description: User-defined package name, e.g., 'Sophia's 9th Birthday Package'

interfaces.name: getGiftCardOptions
interfaces.description: Get available gift card presets and configuration info for the Gift Cards page.

interfaces.name: configureGiftCardAndAddToCart
interfaces.description: Configure a gift card (amount, recipient and sender details, delivery) and add it to the cart.

parameters.name: custom_amount
parameters.description: Used when a specific preset option is not selected

interfaces.name: getCart
interfaces.description: Get the current cart contents for the single user, including items and subtotal.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update quantity for a cart item and recalculate cart totals.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the cart and update totals.

interfaces.name: getFavoritesList
interfaces.description: Get the current favorites list, including expanded show and performer details.

interfaces.name: addShowToFavorites
interfaces.description: Add a show to the favorites list.

interfaces.name: addPerformerToFavorites
interfaces.description: Add a performer to the favorites list.

interfaces.name: removeFavoriteItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the favorites list.

interfaces.name: addPerformerToCompareList
interfaces.description: Add a performer to the active performer comparison list.

interfaces.name: removePerformerFromCompareList
interfaces.description: Remove a performer from the active performer comparison list.

interfaces.name: addShowToCompareList
interfaces.description: Add a show to the active show comparison list.

interfaces.name: removeShowFromCompareList
interfaces.description: Remove a show from the active show comparison list.

interfaces.name: getCompareList
interfaces.description: Get the current comparison list (performers or shows) with side-by-side attributes.

best_two_hour_corporate_package_price.description: For corporate comparisons, 2-hour package price when available

interfaces.name: loginWithEmailPassword
interfaces.description: Log in a user with email and password and establish single-user context.

interfaces.name: getMyBookings
interfaces.description: Get all bookings for the current logged-in user, highlighting upcoming events.

interfaces.name: getBookingDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific booking, including reschedule options and itinerary information.

interfaces.name: rescheduleBooking
interfaces.description: Reschedule an existing booking to a new date while keeping the same start time where required.

interfaces.name: sendPerformerContactMessage
interfaces.description: Send a message to a performer from their profile page.

interfaces.name: submitQuoteRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a quote request for a specific show.

interfaces.name: submitContactUsForm
interfaces.description: Submit a general contact or support request from the Contact Us page.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or create the single-user cart.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateFavoritesList
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or create the single-user favorites list.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCompareList
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or create compare list objects for a given compare_type.

helperFunctions.name: _getCurrentUserContext
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to manage single-user login state, including linking bookings and favorites.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateCustomPackagePricing
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to calculate pricing for a custom package based on base show and add-ons.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateBookingPricingAfterPromo
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to apply promo code rules and update booking pricing and suggestions.
